title: Guril
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Guril''''' was a group of four [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] which were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

When the decision was made to construct a shipyard in Airam space, ''Guril'', were part of a Rebel convoy charged with bringing the needed supplies and personnel. ''Guril'' bore generic supplies. Unfortunately for the Rebels, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had learned of them and readied a [[Battle of Rocrin|trap]] in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. The entire convoy was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
